title: Device Home screen - Connection status
scenario: Verify that the Device Home Screen correctly displays 'Connected' with a green marker when the headset is paired and connected, and changes to 'Disconnected' with a red marker when the headset is turned off.
steps: 1. Ensure the headset (HS) is paired with the device.
2. Turn on the headset and confirm it is connected.
3. Navigate to the Device Home Screen.
6. Observe the connection status display again.
expected: When the headset is paired and connected, the status should show 'Connected' with a green marker. When the headset is turned off, the status should change to 'Disconnected' with a red marker.
